query: Use Model Boss Lite for this 12-file billing refactor: keep the selected Sol main loop in charge of planning and review, and delegate the bounded implementation to a worker.
在 Codex 里启用 Model Boss Lite：把 src/pipeline 下七八个文件的导出逻辑改成流式处理，让 Kimi 写实现，主循环负责计划、门禁和验收。
Run Model Boss Max for the admin dashboard build: keep the Codex Terra main loop, use a distinct Sol reviewer, and let an optional Kimi worker implement the nine CRUD resources.
Use Model Boss Max mode and route this migration of 40+ API handlers through a Sol authority reviewer; have cheaper workers do the mechanical Zod edits and keep the main loop as coordinator.
Model Boss Lite, please: orchestrate the notification system across email, webhook, in-app delivery, and tests instead of spending the authority model's quota on all implementation.

From Codex, use Model Boss to dispatch the 500-line CSV import feature to a sandboxed Kimi worker, keep the current main loop unchanged, and require gates plus complete patch review before integration.
这个任务挺大：用 Model Boss Max 重构整个 auth 模块并补测试，Sol 做独立评审，Kimi 只做受限实现，主循环拆任务和验收。
We have about 200 moment() call sites to migrate to dayjs. Use Model Boss to split the mechanical work across workers and review the complete audited patch at the end.
Build the full scraper subsystem—fetcher, parser, rate limiter, storage, CLI, and tests—with Model Boss Lite so worker agents handle the bounded code packets.
Convert this 3,000-line jQuery module into tested React components with Model Boss Max: plan first, dispatch isolated chunks, gate them, then get final authority approval.
how much does claude sonnet cost per million tokens compared to opus? trying to figure out our api bill
can you review this diff for bugs before i merge? it's about 300 lines in the payments service
fix the typo in the README installation section, it says 'insall'
why is my vitest gate failing in CI but passing locally? same node version supposedly
spawn a subagent to search the codebase for where we handle stripe webhooks, i can never find it

帮我看看这个 500 报错是哪来的,顺便修一下,应该就是那个接口的事
which model should i pick in claude code for everyday coding? is opus overkill
add a loading spinner to the submit button in Login.tsx while the request is pending
run the test suite and tell me which three tests are slowest, thinking about splitting CI
